response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong senior individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling experience (CI/CD setup, test frameworks, MCP tooling) and well over 8 years of engineering, but the resume shows no evidence of people management — no direct reports, no hiring, no performance reviews, no team-building. This role is fundamentally a people-leadership position requiring at least 2 years of management; without that foundation, even a technically excellent IC is unqualified for the level described.
strengths: Genuine developer-tooling track record: built CI/CD pipelines, authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner, contributes MCP code generators at re:cinq
Broad technical depth across full-stack, mobile (iOS/Apple TV), embedded, and low-latency systems — relevant to a cross-platform productivity mandate
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and technical influence through Staff-level roles, multi-day workshops, and conference talks
concerns: Zero evidence of people management: no mention of direct reports, 1-on-1s, performance cycles, hiring, or org-level planning anywhere in a 17-year career
No indication of cross-team or organizational change leadership — GISCollective is a solo/small open-source project, not an org-scale initiative
Mobile-platform depth is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015–2016; no sustained mobile-platform ecosystem ownership
